heroHeadline: Day 38: Iran's Top University Bombed — 34 Killed; Houthis Enter War
heroSubtitle: US-Israeli strikes hit Iran's top university killing 34 in the conflict's deadliest single-site civilian attack. Houthis formally enter the war as Trump claims US armed Iranian dissidents via Kurdish intermediaries.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-06. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times.
